# scannerDevice(_:didScanTo:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the client when the scanner receives the requested scan.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func scannerDevice(_ scanner: ICScannerDevice, didScanTo url: URL)
```

## Discussion

If the [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICScannerDevice/selectedFunctionalUnit] is a document feeder, then this message is sent once for each scanned page.

## Performing a Scan

- **scannerDevice(_:didCompleteOverviewScanWithError:)**: Tells the client when the scanner completes an overview scan.
- **scannerDevice(_:didCompleteScanWithError:)**: Tells the client when the scanner completes a scan.
- **scannerDevice(_:didScanTo:)**: Tells the client when the scanner receives the requested scan progress notification and a band of data is sent for each notification received.
